examples: Will the new rules affect me?

meanings.definition: act physically on; have an effect upon
examples: the medicine affects my heart rate
This new ruling affects your business

meanings.definition: make believe with the intent to deceive
examples: He feigned that he was ill

meanings.definition: have an emotional or cognitive impact upon
examples: This child impressed me as unusually mature
This behavior struck me as odd

meanings.definition: speaking or behaving in an artificial way to make an impression
being excited or provoked to the expression of an emotion
examples: very touched by the stranger's kindness
